Hero.name: Roman
Hero.tagline: Interfaces that feel alive. Systems that stay quiet.

About.body: I work across PHP/Laravel and modern JavaScript (React, Vue), combining expressive, motion-rich frontends with resilient backends. Recently focused on AI-integrated Laravel products, cinematic landing pages, voice/LLM pipelines, and type-safe APIs.

Skills.subtitle: // chosen for shipping fast and keeping production calm

Projects.note: // motion-driven UIs · Laravel APIs · self-hosted AI services

cookforia.title: Cookforia
cookforia.description: Culinary studio in Saint Petersburg — master-classes, corporate events, weddings, catering. Three studios, full booking flow, gift certificates, multi-cuisine catalog with chef bios.

bumwerk.title: Bumwerk
bumwerk.description: Specialised BMW & MINI service center — diagnostics, engine repair, chip tuning for 2018+ models. In-house parts catalog, daily-hour appointment booking, certified-master profiles.

suno-cleaner.title: Suno Cleaner
suno-cleaner.description: Local AI watermark remover for Suno / Sonauto tracks. Laravel API + Next.js dashboard wired to a Demucs / Encodec / mmm DSP pipeline. Self-hosted, batch processing, queued jobs.

ai-secretary.title: AI Secretary System
ai-secretary.description: Local AI secretary, tech support & sales manager. XTTS v2 voice cloning, real-time recognition (Vosk / Whisper), offline LLM (vLLM + Qwen / Llama). Vue 3 admin panel, Telegram bot, site widget, fine-tuning pipeline.

react-pizza.title: React Pizza v2
react-pizza.description: Pizza delivery storefront — Redux Toolkit + RTK Query, debounced search, category filters, sort, pagination, persistent cart with skeleton-loaders during fetch.

vue-sneakers.title: Vue Sneakers
vue-sneakers.description: Vue 3 sneaker storefront — Composition API, reactive cart drawer, favourites, order history, debounced search, persisted state. Built on Vite with Tailwind utility styling.

hotel-booking.title: Hotel Booking
hotel-booking.description: Hand-coded SCSS / BEM hotel landing — typographic hero, responsive grid, animated booking widget. Pure HTML / CSS / JS — a study in CSS architecture.

video-player.title: Custom Video Player
video-player.description: Custom HTML5 video controls — play / pause, volume, scrub, fullscreen, keyboard shortcuts. Vanilla JS, no libraries. Themable via CSS variables.

claude-progressline.title: Claude Progressline
claude-progressline.description: Open-source statusline for Claude Code CLI — model badge, context window usage, rate limits, project folder. Cross-platform PowerShell core.

Contact.body: Open to fullstack work, AI integrations, and high-craft landing pages. Drop a line — I usually reply within a day.
